subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The Ancient Sovereign doth, from the direction of the Most Great Prison, at all times summon them that dwell in the realm of possibility unto the All-Glorious Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مالک قدم از شطر سجن اعظم در کل احیان اهل امکان را بفردوس ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God, @equality of men and women, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
